title: fraxinus depauperata
intro: Fraxinus depauperata, also known as the dwarf ash, is a small deciduous tree or shrub that belongs to the olive family (Oleaceae). The medicinal properties of Fraxinus depauperata include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic, making it useful in treating urinary tract issues and fever. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Fraxinus depauperata is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
